sources.title: The Texas Kid (1943)
sources.description: Marshals Nevada and Sandy are after Scully and his gang who have been robbing stage-coaches. The Texas Kid is part of the gang and Sandy thinks he is bad but Nevada knows him and thinks he may be good. Watch on RetroFlix:

sources.title: The Texas Kid (1943) JOHNNY MACK BROWN
sources.description:
Stars: Johnny Mack Brown, Raymond Hatton, Marshall Reed 
Director: Lambert Hillyer

A pair of Marshals are after a gang that includes the Texas Kid, who have been robbing stage-coaches.

sources.title: The Texas Kid ( 1943) JOHNNY MACK BROWN
sources.description: Two fearless U.S. marshals struggle to stop frontier bully Scully (Edmund Cobb) and his hired guns from hijacking stagecoach deliveries and clearing out the local banks. Against the protests of his partner, Sandy Hopkins (Raymond Hatton), Jack "Nevada" McKenzie (Johnny Mack Brown) forges an uneasy a lliance with a mysterious member of Scully's camp, a youthful gunslinger known as the Texas Kid (Marshall Reed). As the trio investigates, the Kid begins to reveal an agenda entirely his own.

metadata.Plot: Marshals Nevada and Sandy are after Scully and his gang who have been robbing stage-coaches. The Texas Kid is part of the gang and Sandy thinks he is bad but Nevada knows him and thinks he may be good.
metadata.Actors: Johnny Mack Brown, Raymond Hatton, Marshall Reed
